-\section{Thiß║┐t kß║┐ Mß╗®c ─æß╗Ö RTL Qu├®t ─Éa luß╗ōng (7.5.2 RTL Design Multiple Scan)}
-Mß╗źc ph├ón ─æoß║Īn n├Āy tr├¼nh b├Āy chi tiß║┐t kh├óu triß╗ān khai mß╗Öt thiß║┐t kß║┐ qu├®t ─æa luß╗ōng (multiple scan) tr├¬n m├┤ h├¼nh \textit{Adding Machine} ─æ├Ż ─æŲ░ß╗Żc giß╗øi thuyß║┐t ß╗¤ ChŲ░ŲĪng 2. TŲ░ŲĪng ─æß╗ōng y nhŲ░ nhß╗»ng thß║Żo luß║Łn rß╗æt r├Īo vß╗ü \textit{full scan} phß║¦n trŲ░ß╗øc, mß║Ęc d├╣ sŲĪ ─æß╗ō h├¼nh hß╗Źa mß║Īch ─æiß╗ćn bß╗Öc lß╗Ö nhiß╗üu ─æiß╗ām dß╗ŗ quy so vß╗øi m├┤ h├¼nh \textbf{Huffman} xuß║źt hiß╗ćn lß║źp lß╗Łng ß╗¤ H├¼nh 7.44, kß║┐t cß║źu nguy├¬n gß╗æc hß╗ć mß║Īch vß║½n ho├Ān to├Ān chuß║®n mß╗▒c theo cŲĪ tr├║c ─æ├│, v├Ā phŲ░ŲĪng ph├Īp qu├®t nhiß╗üu luß╗ōng (multiple scan) ß╗¤ Mß╗źc 7.4 ─æŲ░ŲĪng nhi├¬n c├│ thß╗ā dß╗ģ d├Āng ─æŲ░ß╗Żc ß╗®ng dß╗źng trß╗▒c tiß║┐p cho khung h├¼nh mß║Īch ─æiß╗ćn n├Āy.
+\subsection{Ph├ón t├Łch n├║t thß║»t thß╗Øi gian test (Bß╗Ģ sung cß╗¦a nh├│m)}
+\textbf{[Bß╗Ģ sung kiß║┐n thß╗®c cß╗¦a nh├│m]} V├▓ng lß║Ęp \texttt{repeat(24)} ch├Łnh l├Ā ``n├║t thß║»t cß╗Ģ chai'' (bottleneck) lß╗øn nhß║źt cß╗¦a Full Scan. Vß╗øi v├Ł dß╗ź Adding Machine chß╗ē c├│ 24 flip-flop, th├¼ thß╗Øi gian dß╗ŗch kh├┤ng ─æ├Īng kß╗ā. NhŲ░ng h├Ży xem x├®t c├┤ng thß╗®c tß╗Ģng qu├Īt cho thß╗Øi gian test:
+
+$$T_{test} \approx V \times (L + 1) \times T_{clk}$$
+
+Trong ─æ├│: $V$ = sß╗æ lŲ░ß╗Żng test vectors, $L$ = chiß╗üu d├Āi chuß╗Śi scan (sß╗æ flip-flop), $T_{clk}$ = chu kß╗│ xung nhß╗ŗp.
+
+Trong thiß║┐t kß║┐ chip thŲ░ŲĪng mß║Īi hiß╗ćn ─æß║Īi, mß╗Öt bß╗Ö xß╗Ł l├Į c├│ thß╗ā chß╗®a h├Āng triß╗ću flip-flop. Nß║┐u ├Īp dß╗źng Full Scan dß║Īng chuß╗Śi ─æŲĪn (single chain), giß║Ż sß╗Ł $L = 1.000.000$ Flip-flop, $V = 10.000$ vectors, $T_{clk} = 10 ns$:
 
-\subsection{Thiß║┐t kß║┐ Qu├®t Cß║źp RT (7.5 RT Level Scan Design)}
+$$T_{test} = 10.000 \times 1.000.001 \times 10 \text{ ns} = 100.000 \text{ gi├óy} \approx 27.8 \text{ giß╗Ø}$$
 
-Ch├║ng t├┤i thß╗▒c thi viß╗ćc thiß║┐t ─æß║Ęt bß║▒ng 3 chuß╗Śi qu├®t (scan chains) mang chiß╗üu d├Āi \textbf{ho├Ān to├Ān tŲ░ŲĪng ─æß╗ōng} nhau: Chuß╗Śi thß╗® nhß║źt l├Ām nhiß╗ćm vß╗ź bao thß║źu thanh ghi t├Łch luß╗╣ \texttt{AC}, chuß╗Śi hai ├┤m trß╗Źn dß║Żi thanh ghi lß╗ćnh \texttt{IR}, v├Ā chuß╗Śi mß║Īch c├▓n lß║Īi che chß║»n bß║Żo trß╗Ż cho to├Ān khß╗æi \texttt{PC} phß╗æi ngß║½u th├¬m 2 flip-flop mß║Żng ─æiß╗üu khiß╗ān. Mß║źu chß╗æt cß╗¦a sß╗▒ t├¼nh l├Ā chiß╗üu d├Āi k├Łch cß╗Ī cß╗¦a cß║Ż thß║Ży 3 chuß╗Śi qu├®t ─æ├│ ho├Ān to├Ān ─æß╗ōng loß║Īt bß║▒ng nhau, lß╗Żi thß║┐ ─æ├│ ban ─æß║Ęc ├ón cho ta cß║źp triß╗ān dß║Īng song song h├│a ─æa lß╗æi (multiple parallel scan chains), mang ─æß║┐n Ų░u thß║┐ tß╗æi thŲ░ß╗Żng nhß║▒m ─æŲĪn giß║Żi h├│a luß╗ōng ─æiß╗üu khiß╗ān t├Łn hiß╗ću qu├®t ng├Ą. LŲ░ß╗øt qua H├¼nh \ref{fig:scan_chain}, sŲĪ ─æß╗ō minh hß╗Źa hß╗ć thß╗æng ch├©n 3 mß║Īch qu├®t ─æan len luß╗ōng ß╗¤ tß║¦m vi m├┤ RTL \textit{Adding Machine}.
+Con sß╗æ n├Āy l├Ā kh├┤ng thß╗ā chß║źp nhß║Łn ─æŲ░ß╗Żc trong sß║Żn xuß║źt h├Āng loß║Īt, nŲĪi mß╗Śi gi├óy tr├¬n m├Īy ATE (Automatic Test Equipment) ─æß╗üu tß╗æn chi ph├Ł rß║źt lß╗øn. ─É├óy ch├Łnh l├Ā l├Į do th├║c ─æß║®y sß╗▒ ra ─æß╗Øi cß╗¦a kß╗╣ thuß║Łt \textbf{Multiple Parallel Scans} ß╗¤ mß╗źc tiß║┐p theo.
+
+% ======================================================================
+% Mß╗żC 3: MULTIPLE SCAN TR├ŖN ADDING MACHINE (Dß╗ŗch tß╗½ gi├Īo tr├¼nh)
+% ======================================================================
+\section{Thiß║┐t kß║┐ Qu├®t ─Éa luß╗ōng cß║źp RTL (7.5.2 RTL Design Multiple Scan)}
+
+\subsection{├Ø tŲ░ß╗¤ng ph├ón chia chuß╗Śi}
+Mß╗źc n├Āy tr├¼nh b├Āy c├Īch triß╗ān khai thiß║┐t kß║┐ qu├®t ─æa luß╗ōng (multiple scan design) tr├¬n mß║Īch Adding Machine ─æ├Ż giß╗øi thiß╗ću ß╗¤ ChŲ░ŲĪng 2 cß╗¦a s├Īch gß╗æc. TŲ░ŲĪng tß╗▒ phß║¦n thß║Żo luß║Łn vß╗ü Full Scan ß╗¤ mß╗źc trŲ░ß╗øc, mß║Ęc d├╣ sŲĪ ─æß╗ō mß║Īch tr├┤ng kh├Īc so vß╗øi m├┤ h├¼nh Huffman ß╗¤ H├¼nh 7.44, nhŲ░ng bß║Żn chß║źt cß║źu tr├║c mß║Īch vß║½n tu├ón theo m├┤ h├¼nh ─æ├│, v├Ā phŲ░ŲĪng ph├Īp qu├®t ─æa luß╗ōng (multiple scan) ß╗¤ Mß╗źc 7.4 ho├Ān to├Ān ├Īp dß╗źng ─æŲ░ß╗Żc cho mß║Īch n├Āy.
+
+\subsection{Thiß║┐t kß║┐ Qu├®t ß╗¤ Mß╗®c RT (7.5 RT Level Scan Design)}
+Ch├║ng ta sß╗Ł dß╗źng \textbf{3 chuß╗Śi scan c├│ chiß╗üu d├Āi bß║▒ng nhau}:
+\begin{enumerate}
+    \item \textbf{Chuß╗Śi 1:} Bao phß╗¦ thanh ghi t├Łch luß╗╣ \texttt{AC} (Accumulator).
+    \item \textbf{Chuß╗Śi 2:} Bao phß╗¦ thanh ghi lß╗ćnh \texttt{IR} (Instruction Register).
+    \item \textbf{Chuß╗Śi 3:} Bao phß╗¦ thanh ghi bß╗Ö ─æß║┐m chŲ░ŲĪng tr├¼nh \texttt{PC} (Program Counter) cß╗Öng th├¬m 2 flip-flop ─æiß╗üu khiß╗ān.
+\end{enumerate}
+
+V├¼ k├Łch thŲ░ß╗øc cß║Ż 3 chuß╗Śi scan bß║▒ng nhau, ch├║ng ta c├│ thß╗ā ├Īp dß╗źng cß║źu h├¼nh \textbf{qu├®t song song ─æa chuß╗Śi (multiple parallel scan chains)}, gi├║p ─æŲĪn giß║Żn ho├Ī ─æ├Īng kß╗ā logic ─æiß╗üu khiß╗ān scan. H├¼nh \ref{fig:scan_chain} minh hoß║Ī 3 chuß╗Śi scan n├Āy trong sŲĪ ─æß╗ō RTL cß╗¦a Adding Machine.

-C├Īc chuß╗Śi nh├Īnh \textit{scan chain} n├Āy kh├┤ng sinh tß╗½ kh├Ł trß╗Øi m├Ā ─æŲ░ß╗Żc dß╗ćt mß║Żng ─æan ch├╣y thß╗¦ c├┤ng bß║▒ng tay lß╗ōng thß║»t v├Āo ngay thiß║┐t ph├Īc \textit{netlist} - mß╗Öt biß║┐n thß╗ā tß╗Ģng sinh tr├Łch lß╗źc tß╗½ viß╗ćc bi├¬n dß╗ŗch m├Ż Verilog th├┤ cß╗¦a con Adding Machine. Thao t├Īc nh├║ng cŲĪ ─æß╗ō biß║┐n thß╗®c scan sß║Į v─®nh viß╗ģn ─æß║Żo h├│a t├Łnh chß║źt cß║źu h├¼nh ph├ón ng├Ą (ports) mß║Īch netlist ─æß╗ōng thß╗Øi xß║┐p dß╗Ī lß║Īi tß╗Źa ─æß╗Ö vß╗ŗ ─æß╗ō c├Īc con trß╗Å flip-flops sß╗¤ hß╗»u trong n├│. H├¼nh ─æoß║Īn m├Ż \ref{lst:755} lß╗Öt tß║Ż mß╗Öt tr├Łch ─æoß║Īn g├│c nhß╗Å cß╗¦a khung biß║┐n thß╗®c cß║Żi quy netlist n├Āy. 
-
-Dß╗ģ d├Āng thu nhß║Łn ├Īnh nh├¼n, ng├Ą ch├ón mode ─æiß╗üu tiß║┐n \texttt{NbarT} gß╗Öp tß╗ź vß╗øi bß╗Ö ba t├Łn ng├Ą input nß╗æi tiß║┐p nß╗æi thß║│ng (\texttt{ir\_Si}, \texttt{ac\_Si}, v├Ā \texttt{pc\_Si}) ch├¼nh ├¼nh ─æŲ░ß╗Żc g├Īn thß║│ng bi├¬n ─æ├│ng th├¬m v├Āo bß╗ć \textit{inputs}, theo chiß╗üu ngŲ░ß╗Żc d├▓ng, sß╗▒ tß╗ōn tß║Īi 3 cß╗Ģng xuß║źt b├│c t├Īch bi├¬n tuyß║┐n nß╗æi tiß║┐p (\texttt{ir\_So}, \texttt{ac\_So}, v├Ā \texttt{cntrl\_So}) ─æŲ░ß╗Żc gß║»n chß║Ęt lß║źp th├¬m tß║Īi sŲ░ß╗Øn mß║Īn cß╗Źc ng├Ą xuß║źt (\textit{output ports}) cho vi m├┤ ─æß╗ō netlist ─æ├Ż bao h├Ām t├Łch \textit{scan} n├Āy. 
-
-Phß║¦n 3 khu vß╗▒c ngoß║Ęc ch├║ th├Łch ß╗¤ H├¼nh \ref{lst:755} ─æ├Īnh mß╗æc thß╗ā hiß╗ćn ─æ├║ng 3 cß║źy lŲ░ß╗øi \textit{scan chains}. Mß╗Źi con trß╗Å \textit{flip-flops} chß║Ż s├│t mß╗Öt mß║Īng mß║Ży may n├Āo ─æß╗üu gß╗ōng nß║Īp ch├ón \texttt{NbarT} dŲ░ß╗øi vai ng├Ą thß╗ź ─æß║¦u v├Āo. +\subsection{Ch├©n chuß╗Śi Scan v├Āo Netlist}
+C├Īc chuß╗Śi scan ─æŲ░ß╗Żc \textbf{ch├©n thß╗¦ c├┤ng (manually inserted)} v├Āo netlist. Netlist n├Āy ch├Łnh l├Ā kß║┐t quß║Ż cß╗¦a qu├Ī tr├¼nh tß╗Ģng hß╗Żp (synthesize) m├Ż Verilog cß╗¦a Adding Machine. Viß╗ćc ch├©n scan sß║Į g├óy ra thay ─æß╗Ģi ß╗¤ \textbf{hai chß╗Ś}:
+\begin{enumerate}
+    \item \textbf{Cß╗Ģng giao tiß║┐p (ports):} Th├¬m c├Īc ch├ón v├Āo/ra mß╗øi cho ─æŲ░ß╗Øng scan.
+    \item \textbf{Sß║»p xß║┐p flip-flop:} C├Īc flip-flop ─æŲ░ß╗Żc kß║┐t nß╗æi lß║Īi th├Ānh c├Īc chuß╗Śi theo thß╗® tß╗▒ mong muß╗æn.
+\end{enumerate}

+\subsection{ChŲ░ŲĪng tr├¼nh Test cho Multiple Scan}

+H├¼nh \ref{lst:756} tr├¼nh b├Āy bß╗Ö tester ß║Żo (virtual tester) m├┤ phß╗Ång h├Ānh vi cß╗¦a mß╗Öt thiß║┐t bß╗ŗ ATE v├Ā chŲ░ŲĪng tr├¼nh test tŲ░ŲĪng ß╗®ng. -Nhß╗ŗp v├▓ng quay phß║»c thß║Żo cho ng├Ż ─æß╗ō test procedure th├¼ ─æŲ░ß╗Żc chß╗æt g├┤ng c├╣m kiß╗üm h├Żm bß╗Źc gi├Īp nß║▒m im trong khß╗æi block sŲĪ tß║Īo \texttt{initial} nh├┤ cß╗Öm cß╗¦a khß╗æi H├¼nh \ref{lst:756}. +NhŲ░ thß╗ā hiß╗ćn trong m├Ż, khß╗æi instantiation cß╗¦a netlist (m├Ż mß╗Öt phß║¦n hiß╗ān thß╗ŗ ß╗¤ H├¼nh \ref{lst:755}) bao gß╗ōm \texttt{NbarT} c├╣ng c├Īc ng├Ą v├Āo v├Ā ng├Ą ra nß╗æi tiß║┐p cß╗¦a cß║Ż 3 chuß╗Śi scan.
 
-Chß║źm phß║®y ph├║t sau c├╣ng khi bu├┤ng tay g├Īc b├║t thao thiß║┐t rß║Į ba l├Ān ph├ón tuyß║┐n n├Āy xong xu├┤i, d├Ān \textit{registers} lß║Łt ─æß║Łt sß║Į ─æ├│n nß║Īp nhß╗ŗp cß║źp bß║Łp b├╣ng ─æß╗ōng ─æiß╗ću ch├©o xuß╗ōng chung (simultaneously) tß║Īo r├Żnh ─æß║Łp cŲ░ß╗øp ─æß╗ōng tß╗æc xung, rß╗ēa ph├║t gi├óy kß║┐ ─æß║źy nß╗Ģ kß║┐t quß║Ż tß╗ź b├│c ng├Ż dß║╣p luß╗ōng tß╗æng tr├Ān chui qua tß╗½ ch├│p \texttt{ir\_So}, b├© \texttt{ac\_So}, nhß╗Źn \texttt{cntrl\_So} ─æß╗ā hß╗æt tß╗ź trß╗Źn chß║Łu lŲ░u tß║Īi ch├│p giß╗Å bu \texttt{saved\_st}. +\subsection{Giß║Żi th├Łch chi tiß║┐t quy tr├¼nh Test}
+Thß╗¦ tß╗źc test ─æŲ░ß╗Żc ─æß║Ęt b├¬n trong khß╗æi \texttt{initial} cß╗¦a H├¼nh \ref{lst:756}. Tß║źt cß║Ż c├Īc phß║¦n ─æß╗üu giß╗æng hß╗ćt H├¼nh 7.53 (\ref{lst:753}), \textbf{ngoß║Īi trß╗½ v├▓ng lß║Ęp \texttt{repeat}}. V├▓ng lß║Ęp \texttt{repeat} ß╗¤ ─æ├óy hoß║Īt ─æß╗Öng nhŲ░ sau:
 
-\textbf{[Phß║¦n ph├ón t├Łch Cß╗¦a Nh├│m]} Viß╗ćc giß║Żm tß╗½ \texttt{repeat(24)} xuß╗æng \texttt{repeat(8)} bß║▒ng hß╗ć thß╗æng ─æa luß╗ōng (Multiple Parallel Scans) ch├Łnh l├Ā ß╗®ng dß╗źng tr├Ł tuß╗ć thiß║┐t kß║┐ nhß║▒m c├ón bß║▒ng (Trade-off) giß╗»a Thß╗Øi gian m├Īy chß║Īy (\textit{Test Time}) v├Ā Sß╗æ ch├ón linh kiß╗ćn (Pin Count - Area overhead). Nhß╗Ø c├Īch l├Ām n├Āy, chi ph├Ł Test rß║╗ ─æi gß║źp ba, chß╗ē tß╗æn khoß║Żn ─æß║¦u tŲ░ mß╗Öt lß║¦n v├Āo d├óy vi mß║Īch.
+\begin{enumerate}
+    \item Lß║źy tß╗½ng nh├│m \textbf{8 bit} tß╗½ biß║┐n \texttt{line} (chß╗®a test vector ─æß║¦u v├Āo) v├Ā g├Īn ─æß╗ōng thß╗Øi cho 3 ch├ón scan input: \texttt{ir\_Si}, \texttt{ac\_Si}, \texttt{pc\_Si}.

+    \item C├Īc gi├Ī trß╗ŗ output ─æŲ░ß╗Żc \textbf{xß║┐p c├Īch nhau 8 bit} trong mß║Żng \texttt{saved\_st} ─æß╗ā ─æß║Żm bß║Żo c├Īc bit ─æß║¦u ra cß╗¦a c├╣ng mß╗Öt chuß╗Śi scan nß║▒m liß╗ün kß╗ü nhau.
+\end{enumerate}

-\subsection{C├Īc m├┤ h├¼nh Qu├®t cß║źp RTL (7.5.3 Scan Designs for RTL)}
-Quy hoß║Īch ph├Īc thß║Żo mu├┤n vß║Īn bß║Żn lŲ░ß╗Żc ─æß╗ŗnh khu├┤n mß║Żng scan designs rß║Łp khu├┤n quy hß╗ć cß║źp ─æß╗Ö \textit{RT level design} chß║│ng kh├│ kh─ān mß║Ży may chi nß║┐u tinh anh b├Īm trß╗ź vß╗ŗ nh├Żn quang g├│c ng├Ż tŲ░ cß║źp h├Ām RTL thß║źu r├Ą r├Ānh mß║Īch ngay ─æiß╗ām cß╗Öi. Gi├óy ph├║t ─æiß╗ćp vß╗ź ph├Īc cŲ░ŲĪng bi├¬n soß║Īn ─æß║»p x├óy gß║Īch ─æß╗ō l├¬n luß╗æng nh├Īo ß╗Ģn thß╗Åa xong (planning is done), mß╗Öt nh├Īt ch├│p tr├╣ lŲ░ß╗Żng sß╗æ v┼®ng dß╗▒ ─æo├Īn d├Ānh mß║Żng \textit{test time} c├│ thß╗ā chß╗ōi ngay l├¬n ─æong lŲ░ß╗Øng nß║Īp thu ─æŲ░ß╗Żc. Khß║Żm quy chß║»p tß║Īo dß╗▒ng gß║Īch x├óy ─æß╗ŗnh thß╗®c rß║Łp khß╗æi ph├┤i scan ─æ├║c thiß║┐t kß║┐ ─æŲ░ß╗Żc hoß║Īch h├│a nh─ām ─æ├© ├║p l├¬n mß║Żng ph├Łm nhß║Ż ch├│t \textit{synthesized output} b├│c tß╗½ cß╗źc khß╗æi m├Ż HDL \textit{RT-level}. Viß╗ćc bß║Į nhß╗ŗp nß║»n cung ─æ├Ān \textit{test program} trß╗¤ n├¬n th├┤ng tho├Īng dß╗ģ nuß╗æt bß╗Öi phß║¦n khi ─æß║¦u tr├Ł li├¬n kß║┐t m├│c rß║Łp con mß║Īch uß╗æn bß║╗ trong tr├Ł n├Żo hß╗ćt khß╗æi vi ph├ón cß╗¦a thiß║┐t ─æß╗ō g├Ż \textit{Huffman} v─āng ph├┤i m├│c nhß║Ż ra hß║Łu chß║»p ngß║»t ─æiß╗ün mß║Żng scan ph├Łm n├Āy.
-
-Dß╗ōi d├Āo thau lß╗źa phŲ░ŲĪng ├Īn cß║źu lß║Łp bi├¬n kß╗ŗch lß╗Ö mß║Żng \textit{scan design} mß╗¤ cß╗æi ngh├¬nh thß║źu hß╗ć biß║┐n mß║Żng thiß║┐t mß║Īch luß╗ōng ng├Ż ng┼® RTL tr├Łch tß╗½ v├Ł phß╗Ång tiß╗āu ─æoß║Īn mß╗źc n├Āy phŲĪi lß╗Ö v├┤ sß╗æ chi├¬u ng├Ż dß╗ŗ ß╗®ng cß║źu dß║Īng \textbf{partial scan} (qu├®t mß║Żng chß║╗ nß╗Ła b├Īn th├ón), v├Ā tß╗ź rß║Į th├Īo ─æß╗Öc lß║Łp \textbf{multiple independent scans} (dß╗ŗch cß╗¤i xß║Ż cß║źu rß║Į lß║źp lß║Łp th├Īo chia ─æa dß║Īng rß╗Øi). Bß║▒ng lß╗æi bß║╗ linh ch├│p ─æß║Żo quß║®y ─æŲ░ß╗Øng kh├Īc ─æi, dß║½u ta phang xß║╗ nß╗®t rß╗Øi mß║Īch ch├Łp bung l├Ām v┼®ng hai: ph├ón nß╗Ła lo ─æŲ░ß╗Øng ng├Ą g├Īnh data \texttt{datapath}, ─æß║Łp nß╗Ła g├Īnh lo ph├ón bi├¬n ─æiß╗üu hŲ░ß╗øng ─æß╗æc mß║Żng \texttt{controller}, mß╗Öt hß╗ć phŲ░ŲĪng vß║Īch gß║Īch nß╗æi \textit{scan design ri├¬ng vi} thß╗½a sß╗®c ─æŲ░ß╗Żc kiß║┐n chß║»p nŲ░ß╗øng ─æß╗Ģ ß╗®ng hiß╗ćn xß║╗o mß║Īch chi cho r├Ānh viß║┐ng ─æß╗Öc t├┤n mß╗Śi phß║┐ mß║Żng n├Āy lß║Łp t├Łnh ri├¬ng vi cß╗▒. Giß║Żi thuß║Łt bß╗Ģ chß║╗ cß║źu tung phß║┐ r├Īch vi ph├ón chia ng├Ą cß║źu h├¼nh linh mß║Żnh c├│ thß╗ā viß╗ćn tß╗øi trß╗Ż ph├Łm ph├Īc ─æß╗ō g├Īn ─æiß╗ün gß║Īch nß╗æi khuy kh├®p \textbf{Isolated scan} (Qu├®t Cß╗Ła Lß║Łp T├Īch Trß╗æng).
-
-Mß╗Śi chß╗æc tr├®o lß║╣o nh├║n gi├│ng ─æß╗ŗnh thß╗®c lß║Łp l├▓a ─æß╗¦ ─æß║¦y vi ─æß╗ō lß╗Ö ch├│p dß╗ćt mß║Żnh chuß╗Śi vß║Īch \textit{scan strategies} dß╗ŗ biß║┐n, tß╗Ģng ch├│p ngß║źn chß╗ē hß║Īn lŲ░ß╗Żng h├Ām vector mß║Żng ng├Īch b─ām (\textit{test vectors}), ch├│p nß╗øi l─ām l─ām chiß╗üu ─æ├óm dß╗ćt tr├╣m g├Īnh cß╗¦a v├┤ ch├│p lß║╗ cß╗¦a vector tß║Į rß║Į, dß║½u ─æiß╗ćp song h├Ānh g├┤ng d─® che ─æß╗Ö d├Āy bß╗Źc \textit{fault coverage} chiß║┐m cŲ░ß╗Żc th├óu g├Ānh ─æß╗Ö chß╗¦ m├│ng khuyß║┐t vß║źp ch├│p lß╗Śi sß║Į rß╗øt n├│n v─® ng├┤i vŲ░ŲĪng trß╗¤ vß║Īc d├Īnh ─æß╗źng v├Āo vß╗ŗ tr├Ł c├Īc tham bß╗æc nhß╗Źn chß╗¦ ph├┤i (\textit{main parameters}) cß╗▒c cß╗▒c chß╗¦ vß╗ŗ buß╗Öc tay gß╗Ī n├Żo n├®m l├║t v├Āo c├ón nhß║Ęt.
-
-\section{Tß╗Ģng kß║┐t ChŲ░ŲĪng (Summary - Mß╗źc 7.6)}
-ChŲ░ŲĪng chuy├¬n luß║Łn n├Āy dß╗ćt mß║Żng b├Ān l├┤i k├®o mß╗Åi cŲĪ v├Āo thiß║┐t ph├Īo ─æß╗ō ch├│p DFT techniques (kß╗╣ ph├Īp mß║Īch thiß║┐t hß╗ć khß║Ż kiß╗ām). Ch├║ng d├ón ta ─æ├Ż sß║»n tay nhß║źc gß║Īch vß║źp bß║»t bß╗ć tß╗½ bao xß║╗o tiß╗āu xß║Żo cŲĪ duy├¬n manh nha (\textit{ad hoc methods}) vß║źp v├Īp leo nß║źc tho├Īi h├│a tiß║┐n c├┤ng bß╗ōi b├Łch tß╗øi lß╗Ö ph├Īp c├┤ c├┤ lß║Łp bi├¬n \textit{isolated scan}. Bao ngß╗ōng biß║┐n th├Īi mß╗Źi cŲĪ mß║Żng tß╗ź dß║Żi n├Āy thiß║┐t ─æß╗ŗnh chß╗Źc ─æ├óm th├│p ├║ng mß║Żng cß║źu ─æß╗ō \textit{combinational} gß╗Öp kh├Ła nß║╗o chuß╗Śi mß║Īch nß║┐p uß╗æn trß║źu \textit{sequential circuits} th├óu t├│m lß║Īi thß║Ży trß╗Źn. Mß║źu quy thiß║┐t mß║Żng vß║Īch bß╗ć scan design - ch├Łp mß║Īch thiß║┐t lß║Łp b├Ān d├│ng nhß║źc r├Żnh ─æ├Ām ph├Īn ch├║ng ta bung mß╗¤ ra ngay m├®p chß╗Åm sß║Żnh Mß╗źc 7.3 - dß╗ōn t├┤ng tß╗ź mß║Īch ├Īnh mß║»t tia xß║╗o ─æß║Łp hß║¦m trß╗Źng ├óm x├®o m├│c kho├®t trß╗Źng yß║┐u lß╗źi ─æ├óm chß╗▒c rß╗øt ng├Ż v├Āo ph├┤i ch├│p mß║Īch gß║Īch vß║Łp sequential uß╗æn lŲ░ß╗Żn tuß║¦n canh nß║┐p nß╗æi, dß║½u kh├│p rß║Łp ├Į niß╗ćm ─æß║Īi vi ─æ├Łch trß╗Źng thß║źu ch├Ł t├┤n cß╗¦a cß╗Ś dß║Żi b├Āi mß║Żng ─æ├│ h├▓ng mong th├Īo c┼®i bß║╗ v├▓ng khoen vß║Łp cß╗¦a mß║Żng chip khuy├¬n lŲ░ß╗Żn sequential bß║╗n th├Ānh 1 dß║Żi ngß║Īch t─ām tß║»p ph├┤i gß║Īch luß╗ōng tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp \textit{combinational circuit}. Viß╗ćc h├│a ph├®p cß║Żi ph├┤i t├Āi lß╗Öc cß╗▒c ─æiß╗ćm ─æß║źy h├▓ng mong mß╗Åi x├│t sa ─æß╗ā dß╗Źn s├ón ph├Łm trß║Īt dß╗ćt lß╗æ tß║»p mß║Żng mß║Īch combinational g├Īnh TG (\textit{Test generation}) phß╗Ång phß╗æc h├Īi nhß║Ęt tß║źp lß╗▒ c├│ ─æß║źt ph├┤ diß╗ģn sinh ─æiß╗ün sß║Żn h├║c nß║Ży ch├│p Test mß║½u.
-
-Rß║Į lß║Łt mß╗ø bß╗ōng b├▓ng hß╗ć phŲ░ŲĪng bi├¬n rß║Īch quy cß║źu mß║Żnh phß║¦n Scan gß║Īch ─æß╗ō luß╗ōng (\textit{scan designs}) kh├Īc biß║┐n mu├┤n h├¼nh th├╣ ta tß║Īc ch├®o ─æ├Ām chuyß╗ćn l├║c n├Ży ho├Ān thuy├¬n vß╗ü mß║Ęt ph├┤i nß║┐p gß╗æc g├Īc rß║Łp khu├┤n theo ─æ├║ng hß╗ć khung nß║┐p mß║źu luß║Łt luß║Łt kia nhß║źt dß║Ī chß║Ż xi├¬n xß║╣o tß║źc n├Āo (\textit{followed the same rule}). Rß║Īch vß║Īch hß║¦m m├®o xß║╣o theo hß╗ć \textbf{partial scan methods}, th├│i lß╗Öng ─æiß╗ün rß║»c mß╗ōi nß║Īp hß╗ć \textit{pseudo inputs} g├Īn bß╗ćn ph├Łm ─æ├║p ch├¬nh v├¬nh rß║»c ─æiß╗ün giß║Ż tß║Īo \textit{pseudo outputs} ho├Ān thuy├¬n chß║Ż lß║źp loe biß║┐n ph├®p ─æŲ░ß╗Żc cß╗źc to├Ān diß╗ćn lß╗Öt m├║t hß║¦m nß║┐p vß║źp \textit{sequential model} ─æß╗ā ─æß╗Ö th├Ānh cß╗źc vi ph├ón ng├Ż r├Ż \textit{combinational}, nhß╗»ng g├Ż mß║źu thanh nß║Ży ghi \textit{registers} hiß╗ćn hß╗ōn vß║½n r├Īc mß║»c nß║▒m ng├Ą neo ─æß║Łu Ų░ŲĪng bŲ░ß╗øng mß║»c bß║½y gi─āng g├Ż khß╗æi khung model nß║Īp ─æiß╗ün ch├│p v├Żn ─æŲ░ß╗Żm lß║źp nß║Ży tr├│p c├│ nß║Īp b├│c m├Īc kß║╣t ─æŲ░ß╗Żc. N├®n phß║Łp ß╗®c ng├Ą c─ām nß║źc hß╗Źng mß║Ęc kß╗ā kß╗ć rß╗¦i hß╗Ång ngß║Īch n├Āy, vi ─æß╗Ö m├┤ ph├┤i h├│a thß║źu mß║Żng nh├Īp x├®n x├Īo n├Āy (\textit{the obtained model}) v─®nh tß╗ōn ng├┤ng cuß╗ōng s├Āi tß║źu x├Āi ─æß║╣p thß║źu kß║╣p gß║»p nhß╗Źn d├Ānh ng├Ż viß╗ćc ng├Ą test vß║źp ─æiß╗ām nß║Īp xß║Ż luß╗ōng ngß║Īch Tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp (─æß╗ā m├│c ─æ─® tß║Īo ─æiß╗ün test - \textit{combinational test generation}). Nh├Łp nh├┤ vß║źp lß╗ćch sai pha dß╗ŗ vŲ░ß╗øng (\textit{deviation}) mß╗æc ─æ├© r├Īch vŲ░ß╗øng t├Īch chia ─æß╗®t khß╗Åi chuß║®n model bß║╗ m├│p thuß║¦n 1 luß╗ōn tß╗Ģ gß╗Öp vŲ░ß╗øng bi├¬n ch├│p cß╗▒c ─æß╗Ö ng├│c bß╗¦a v├óy hß╗ć ph├┤i vi ─æß╗ō dß╗ćt phß║Łp test \textit{test procedure} dß╗ćt quy ─æß║»p xung nß╗øi bu xung clokcs (nhß╗ŗp \textit{clock pulses} ngo├Āi dŲ░ ─æß║»p bß╗ōi) ─æß╗ā tr├®t l├║p bß╗ōi khuyß║┐t ─æß╗ün lß║źp tr├Īm ph├Łm gß╗Ī cho sß╗æ linh chi mß║Żng ─æ├║c Registers ph├Łm uß╗æn bß╗Å dŲ░ ─æß╗ō g├Ż luß╗ōng mß║Īch mß║Żng sß╗®t thß║╣o model n├Ży neo l├Īch ─æß║źy.
-
-Vß╗øi hi vß╗Źng tung vß║Īt ch├Łp rß║Żi biß╗āu ph├┤ chß╗®ng ngß║¦m biß╗āu hiß╗ćn hß╗ć dß╗źng mß║Īch h├Ām m├│c chuß╗Śi rß╗ćp ph├Łm nhß╗ŗp scan methods ─æß║»p ß║źn lß╗ōng gß║Īt v├┤ bß╗ć r├Żnh ─æß║Łp cß║źp m├┤ thß║źu ─æß╗ŗnh RT-level c├╣ng biß╗āu trŲ░ŲĪng m├┤ ngß║Ż biß╗āu hiß╗ćn t├Łnh tr├│c xß╗æi h├Ām tŲ░ŲĪng ├Īi t├Łnh c├│ nß║┐t x├Āi thß╗▒c t├Łnh hß╗Żp mß║Żng quy nß║Īp thß║źu mß║Żng ß║źy (\textit{the applicability of such schemes}), mß╗źc mß║Żng vß╗ćt sau ─æu├┤i ch├│t x├Āi lß║źy 1 bß╗Ö vi mß║Żnh ngß╗æc ng├Ą \textit{RT-level design} c├▓i cß╗Źc c├╣ng bß╗ć g├Īnh ─æß╗ō giß║Ż Test tß╗ŗnh \textit{Verilog testbench} khß║Żm h├▓ng nß║Ęn bß║╗ th├Ł trß║Żo qu├®t scan luß╗ōng ─æ├Ż tr├Īt nh├║ng ng├Ż ─æ├óm ß║źy cß╗¦a luß╗ōn n├│ rß║Łp ─æß║źy. 
-Mß║Żng thiß║┐t cß║źu mß║Īch chip lß╗øn cß╗▒c to bß╗ü dß║¦y b├│c r├Łch si├¬u hß║Īng d├óm (\textit{Larger designs}) kh├óm lß╗ŗm dß║╗ ─æß║Įo gi├│c nhß╗Å c├│ r├Żnh bß╗Ż lß╗Źng r├│c d├│c cß║źu thß╗ā ch├│p ngß║»t uß╗æn ─æß║Łp vß╗Ī quy bß║╗ n├Īt nhß╗½ tß╗Ł r├Ż kh├Ła gß║Īch th├Ānh h├Āng vß║Īn h├Āng l┼® g├Ż ph├ón mß║Żnh cß╗źc nh├Łm (\textit{several subcomponents}), rß║Żi tß║Īi mß╗Śi vi ph├ón mß║Żnh ß╗æc cß╗źc ─æ├│ h├▓ng c├│ khi rß║Łp rß║»c ─æo╠Ći bu cho ri├¬ng lß╗æ phß║¦n cß╗źc ─æiß╗ün 1 hß╗ć r├Ż kh├Īc bß╗æc cß╗¦a nh├Īp \textit{scan} ─æ├║c (\textit{a different form of scan}). Cuß╗Öc ─æß║Īi viß╗ģn li th├Īo rß╗Øi b├│c r├Īch lß╗Öt ─æß╗ō ─æß║Į r├│c vi luß╗æng thiß║┐t thiß║┐t hß╗ć ra h├▓ng b├│c ngß║Īch l┼® cß║źu vß╗ćt cß╗źc phß║┐ ─æß║źy dß║Łp xß║╗o dŲ░ c├│ ─æß║źt ─æß║Īc rß╗Źc vung th├Ānh ─æŲ░ß╗Żc bß║▒ng lß╗æ g├Ż gß║Īch nß╗æi dß╗ćt phß║Łp luß╗ōng shift-register tß╗æng luß╗ōng dß╗ŗch chß║Īy dß╗Źc g├Īc ─æß╗ā m├│c mß║Żng dß╗ŗch th├Łnh v├Āo qu├®t m├│c v┼®ng nß║Īp vŲ░ß╗øng scan-in dß╗æc kß║╣t xß║Ż cß╗æng tuß╗Öt l├║t v├®t lß║źp vß╗ćt (\textit{scanning in and scanning out}) nhß╗»ng mß║Żng lß╗æp phß║┐t rß║Į cß╗¦a h├Ām ph├Łm signal tß╗æng tß╗Żp nß║▒m nh├®t tr├Īt khe ng├Īch chß║Łt nß╗®t cß╗¦a v├óy mß║Īng ph├Łm khe ─æŲ░ß╗Øng chß║╗ kß║┐t giao diß╗ćn ng├Ż vß║źp lß║źp cß╗¦a bß║¦y tß╗ź vung phß╗ć ─æ├Ān l┼® cß╗źc nß║Īt cß║źu kß║┐t \textit{subcomponents} con lß║╗ b├® tin nhß║╗o kia tß╗ź lß║Īi hß╗Öi ─æß║źy. 
+\subsection{So s├Īnh hiß╗ću quß║Ż Full Scan vs Multiple Scan (Bß╗Ģ sung cß╗¦a nh├│m)}
+\textbf{[Bß╗Ģ sung kiß║┐n thß╗®c cß╗¦a nh├│m]} Bß║Żng dŲ░ß╗øi ─æ├óy tß╗Ģng hß╗Żp sß╗▒ kh├Īc biß╗ćt then chß╗æt giß╗»a hai phŲ░ŲĪng ph├Īp khi ├Īp dß╗źng cho mß║Īch Adding Machine (24 flip-flop, 64 test vectors):
+
+\begin{table}[!ht]
+\centering
+\caption{So s├Īnh Full Scan v├Ā Multiple Scan tr├¬n Adding Machine}
+\label{tab:compare}
+\begin{tabular}{|l|c|c|}
+\hline
+\textbf{Ti├¬u ch├Ł} & \textbf{Full Scan (1 chain)} & \textbf{Multiple Scan (3 chains)} \\
+\hline
+Sß╗æ chuß╗Śi scan & 1 & 3 \\
+\hline
+Chiß╗üu d├Āi mß╗Śi chuß╗Śi & 24 flip-flop & 8 flip-flop \\
+\hline
+Sß╗æ chu kß╗│ shift/vector & 24 & 8 \\
+\hline
+Tß╗Ģng shift cycles (64 vectors) & $64 \times 24 = 1536$ & $64 \times 8 = 512$ \\
+\hline
+Sß╗æ ch├ón Scan In & 1 & 3 \\
+\hline
+Sß╗æ ch├ón Scan Out & 1 & 3 \\
+\hline
+Tß╗Ģng ch├ón I/O tß╗æn th├¬m & 2 & 6 \\
+\hline
+Tß╗æc ─æß╗Ö test & Chß║Łm ($\times 1$) & Nhanh gß║źp 3 ($\times 3$) \\
+\hline
+\end{tabular}
+\end{table}
+
+C├┤ng thß╗®c tß╗Ģng qu├Īt khi chia th├Ānh $N$ chuß╗Śi song song bß║▒ng nhau:
+$$T_{multiple} = V \times \frac{L}{N} \times T_{clk}$$
+So vß╗øi Full Scan: $T_{full} = V \times L \times T_{clk}$. Hß╗ć sß╗æ giß║Żm thß╗Øi gian l├Ā $N$ lß║¦n, nhŲ░ng phß║Żi \textbf{─æ├Īnh ─æß╗Ģi bß║▒ng $2 \times N$ ch├ón I/O bß╗Ģ sung} (mß╗Śi chuß╗Śi cß║¦n 1 SI v├Ā 1 SO).
+
+% ======================================================================
+% Mß╗żC 4: C├üC M├ö H├īNH SCAN Cß║żP RTL (Dß╗ŗch tß╗½ gi├Īo tr├¼nh)
+% ======================================================================
+\section{Quy hoß║Īch c├Īc m├┤ h├¼nh Scan cho thiß║┐t kß║┐ cß║źp RTL (7.5.3 Scan Designs for RTL)}
+
+Viß╗ćc lß║Łp kß║┐ hoß║Īch (planning) cho c├Īc thiß║┐t kß║┐ scan kh├Īc nhau ß╗¤ \textbf{mß╗®c RT-level} l├Ā tŲ░ŲĪng ─æß╗æi dß╗ģ d├Āng nß║┐u ta \textbf{nh├¼n nhß║Łn mß║Īch tß╗½ g├│c ─æß╗Ö RTL view} -- tß╗®c l├Ā xem mß║Īch dŲ░ß╗øi dß║Īng c├Īc thanh ghi (registers) v├Ā c├Īc khß╗æi logic tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp kß║┐t nß╗æi ch├║ng. Khi ─æ├Ż lß║Łp kß║┐ hoß║Īch xong, ta c├│ thß╗ā \textbf{Ų░ß╗øc lŲ░ß╗Żng thß╗Øi gian test} (test time estimate). Viß╗ćc triß╗ān khai thß╗▒c tß║┐ (implementation) thiß║┐t kß║┐ scan ─æ├Ż l├¬n kß║┐ hoß║Īch sß║Į ─æŲ░ß╗Żc thß╗▒c hiß╗ćn tr├¬n \textbf{netlist ─æß║¦u ra} cß╗¦a qu├Ī tr├¼nh tß╗Ģng hß╗Żp (synthesis) tß╗½ m├Ż HDL cß║źp RT-level. Viß╗ćc ph├Īt triß╗ān chŲ░ŲĪng tr├¼nh test c┼®ng trß╗¤ n├¬n dß╗ģ d├Āng hŲĪn khi ta suy ngh─® vß╗ü mß║Īch dŲ░ß╗øi dß║Īng \textbf{m├┤ h├¼nh Huffman} sau khi ─æ├Ż ch├©n scan.
+
+\subsection{Partial Scan (Qu├®t Mß╗Öt phß║¦n)}
+Ngo├Āi Full Scan v├Ā Multiple Scan, c├▓n c├│ c├Īc phŲ░ŲĪng ├Īn thiß║┐t kß║┐ scan kh├Īc cho v├Ł dß╗ź RTL cß╗¦a ch├║ng ta, ─æ├│ l├Ā \textbf{Partial Scan} (qu├®t mß╗Öt phß║¦n). Trong Partial Scan, \textbf{kh├┤ng phß║Żi tß║źt cß║Ż} flip-flop ─æß╗üu ─æŲ░ß╗Żc thay bß║▒ng Scan Flip-Flop. Chß╗ē mß╗Öt sß╗æ flip-flop ─æŲ░ß╗Żc chß╗Źn lß╗Źc (thŲ░ß╗Øng l├Ā nhß╗»ng flip-flop nß║▒m tr├¬n c├Īc v├▓ng lß║Ęp phß║Żn hß╗ōi -- feedback loops -- kh├│ kiß╗ām thß╗Ł nhß║źt) mß╗øi ─æŲ░ß╗Żc ch├©n scan.
+
+\textbf{[Bß╗Ģ sung kiß║┐n thß╗®c cß╗¦a nh├│m]} Ų»u ─æiß╗ām cß╗¦a Partial Scan l├Ā giß║Żm ─æ├Īng kß╗ā diß╗ćn t├Łch phß║¦n cß╗®ng bß╗Ģ sung (area overhead) v├Ā giß║Żm ß║Żnh hŲ░ß╗¤ng ─æß║┐n hiß╗ću n─āng (timing/power). Tuy nhi├¬n, nhŲ░ß╗Żc ─æiß╗ām l├Ā \textbf{─æß╗Ö phß╗¦ lß╗Śi (fault coverage)} thŲ░ß╗Øng thß║źp hŲĪn Full Scan, v├Ā c├┤ng cß╗ź ATPG phß║Żi xß╗Ł l├Į m├┤ h├¼nh phß╗®c tß║Īp hŲĪn (v├¼ m├┤ h├¼nh kh├┤ng ho├Ān to├Ān l├Ā tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp -- vß║½n c├▓n mß╗Öt sß╗æ thanh ghi).
+
+\subsection{Multiple Independent Scans (Qu├®t ─Éa luß╗ōng ─Éß╗Öc lß║Łp)}
+Mß╗Öt giß║Żi ph├Īp kh├Īc l├Ā \textbf{Multiple Independent Scans} (qu├®t ─æa luß╗ōng ─æß╗Öc lß║Łp). ├Ø tŲ░ß╗¤ng ß╗¤ ─æ├óy l├Ā nß║┐u ta \textbf{ph├ón chia (partition)} mß║Īch th├Ānh hai phß║¦n ri├¬ng biß╗ćt -- v├Ł dß╗ź phß║¦n \texttt{Datapath} (─æŲ░ß╗Øng dß║½n dß╗» liß╗ću) v├Ā phß║¦n \texttt{Controller} (bß╗Ö ─æiß╗üu khiß╗ān) -- th├¼ c├│ thß╗ā thiß║┐t kß║┐ scan \textbf{ri├¬ng biß╗ćt, ─æß╗Öc lß║Łp} cho tß╗½ng phß║¦n.
+
+\subsection{Isolated Scan (Qu├®t C├┤ lß║Łp)}
+Viß╗ćc t├Īch mß╗Öt mß║Īch th├Ānh nhiß╗üu phß║¦n con (subcomponents) c├│ thß╗ā ─æŲ░ß╗Żc thß╗▒c hiß╗ćn th├┤ng qua kß╗╣ thuß║Łt \textbf{Isolated Scan} (qu├®t c├┤ lß║Łp). Trong kß╗╣ thuß║Łt n├Āy, mß╗Öt thanh ghi dß╗ŗch (shift register) ─æŲ░ß╗Żc ─æß║Ęt tß║Īi \textbf{giao diß╗ćn (interface)} giß╗»a c├Īc phß║¦n con, cho ph├®p dß╗ŗch v├Āo (scan-in) v├Ā dß╗ŗch ra (scan-out) c├Īc gi├Ī trß╗ŗ t├Łn hiß╗ću ß╗¤ ranh giß╗øi giß╗»a ch├║ng. Nhß╗Ø vß║Ły, mß╗Śi phß║¦n con c├│ thß╗ā ─æŲ░ß╗Żc kiß╗ām thß╗Ł \textbf{c├┤ lß║Łp}, ─æß╗Öc lß║Łp vß╗øi c├Īc phß║¦n kh├Īc.
+
+\subsection{C├Īc tham sß╗æ quyß║┐t ─æß╗ŗnh khi lß╗▒a chß╗Źn chiß║┐n lŲ░ß╗Żc Scan}
+Khi lß║Łp kß║┐ hoß║Īch cho c├Īc chiß║┐n lŲ░ß╗Żc scan kh├Īc nhau, c├│ \textbf{3 tham sß╗æ ch├Łnh} cß║¦n c├ón nhß║»c:
+\begin{enumerate}
+    \item \textbf{Sß╗æ lŲ░ß╗Żng test vectors:} C├Āng nhiß╗üu vector th├¼ thß╗Øi gian test c├Āng l├óu, nhŲ░ng ─æß╗Ö phß╗¦ lß╗Śi c├│ thß╗ā cao hŲĪn.
+    \item \textbf{Chiß╗üu d├Āi mß╗Śi test vector:} Phß╗ź thuß╗Öc v├Āo chiß╗üu d├Āi chuß╗Śi scan v├Ā sß╗æ lŲ░ß╗Żng ng├Ą v├Āo/ra song song.
+    \item \textbf{─Éß╗Ö phß╗¦ lß╗Śi (Fault Coverage):} Chß╗ē sß╗æ quan trß╗Źng nhß║źt, thß╗ā hiß╗ćn tß╗Ę lß╗ć phß║¦n tr─ām lß╗Śi c├│ thß╗ā ─æŲ░ß╗Żc ph├Īt hiß╗ćn.
+\end{enumerate}
 
-\section*{T├Āi liß╗ću Tham khß║Żo (References)}
+\textbf{[Bß╗Ģ sung kiß║┐n thß╗®c cß╗¦a nh├│m]} Bß║Żng dŲ░ß╗øi ─æ├óy t├│m tß║»t Ų░u nhŲ░ß╗Żc ─æiß╗ām cß╗¦a tß╗½ng chiß║┐n lŲ░ß╗Żc:
+
+\begin{table}[!ht]
+\centering
+\caption{So s├Īnh c├Īc chiß║┐n lŲ░ß╗Żc Scan Design}
+\label{tab:strategies}
+\begin{tabular}{|l|c|c|c|}
+\hline
+\textbf{Chiß║┐n lŲ░ß╗Żc} & \textbf{Fault Coverage} & \textbf{Area Overhead} & \textbf{Test Time} \\
+\hline
+Full Scan (1 chain) & Cao nhß║źt & Cao nhß║źt & Rß║źt l├óu \\
+\hline
+Multiple Parallel Scan & Cao nhß║źt & Cao (th├¬m ch├ón I/O) & Giß║Żm $N$ lß║¦n \\
+\hline
+Partial Scan & Trung b├¼nh & Thß║źp & Trung b├¼nh \\
+\hline
+Isolated Scan & Tuß╗│ thiß║┐t kß║┐ & Trung b├¼nh & Tuß╗│ ph├ón v├╣ng \\
+\hline
+\end{tabular}
+\end{table}
+
+% ======================================================================
+% Mß╗żC 5: Tß╗öNG Kß║ŠT CHŲ»ŲĀNG (Dß╗ŗch tß╗½ gi├Īo tr├¼nh)
+% ======================================================================
+\section{Tß╗Ģng kß║┐t chŲ░ŲĪng (7.6 Summary)}
+
+ChŲ░ŲĪng n├Āy ─æ├Ż thß║Żo luß║Łn vß╗ü c├Īc \textbf{kß╗╣ thuß║Łt DFT (Design for Test)}. Ch├║ng ta ─æ├Ż bß║»t ─æß║¦u vß╗øi mß╗Öt sß╗æ \textbf{phŲ░ŲĪng ph├Īp ─æß║Ęc th├╣ (ad hoc methods)} v├Ā tß╗½ ─æ├│ ph├Īt triß╗ān dß║¦n l├¬n tß╗øi \textbf{Isolated Scan}. Tß║źt cß║Ż c├Īc phŲ░ŲĪng ph├Īp n├Āy ─æß╗üu c├│ thß╗ā ├Īp dß╗źng cho cß║Ż mß║Īch tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp (combinational) lß║½n mß║Īch tuß║¦n tß╗▒ (sequential).
+
+Kß╗╣ thuß║Łt \textbf{Scan Design} m├Ā ch├║ng ta bß║»t ─æß║¦u thß║Żo luß║Łn tß╗½ Mß╗źc 7.3 chß╗¦ yß║┐u tß║Łp trung v├Āo \textbf{mß║Īch tuß║¦n tß╗▒}, v├Ā mß╗źc ─æ├Łch ch├Łnh cß╗¦a n├│ l├Ā \textbf{biß║┐n ─æß╗Ģi mß║Īch tuß║¦n tß╗▒ th├Ānh mß║Īch tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp} (tß╗½ g├│c nh├¼n kiß╗ām thß╗Ł), sao cho c├Īc phŲ░ŲĪng ph├Īp sinh test tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp (combinational TG methods) c├│ thß╗ā ─æŲ░ß╗Żc sß╗Ł dß╗źng ─æß╗ā tß║Īo mß║½u kiß╗ām thß╗Ł.
+
+C├Īc thiß║┐t kß║┐ scan kh├Īc m├Ā ch├║ng ta ─æ├Ż thß║Żo luß║Łn vß╗ü cŲĪ bß║Żn ─æß╗üu tu├ón theo \textbf{c├╣ng mß╗Öt nguy├¬n tß║»c}. Trong \textbf{Partial Scan methods}, viß╗ćc ─æŲ░a v├Āo c├Īc ng├Ą v├Āo giß║Ż (pseudo inputs) v├Ā ng├Ą ra giß║Ż (pseudo outputs) \textbf{kh├┤ng ho├Ān to├Ān} biß║┐n ─æß╗Ģi m├┤ h├¼nh tuß║¦n tß╗▒ th├Ānh m├┤ h├¼nh tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp -- c├Īc thanh ghi vß║½n c├▓n tß╗ōn tß║Īi trong m├┤ h├¼nh thu ─æŲ░ß╗Żc. Mß║Ęc d├╣ vß║Ły, m├┤ h├¼nh thu ─æŲ░ß╗Żc \textbf{vß║½n c├│ thß╗ā} ─æŲ░ß╗Żc sß╗Ł dß╗źng cho qu├Ī tr├¼nh sinh test tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp. Sß╗▒ sai lß╗ćch (deviation) so vß╗øi m├┤ h├¼nh tß╗Ģ hß╗Żp thuß║¦n tu├Į sß║Į ß║Żnh hŲ░ß╗¤ng ─æß║┐n \textbf{thß╗¦ tß╗źc test} (test procedure), trong ─æ├│ cß║¦n bß╗Ģ sung th├¬m c├Īc \textbf{xung nhß╗ŗp phß╗ź (extra clock pulses)} ─æß╗ā b├╣ ─æß║»p cho nhß╗»ng thanh ghi vß║½n c├▓n lß║Īi trong m├┤ h├¼nh.
+
+─Éß╗ā minh hoß║Ī viß╗ćc ß╗®ng dß╗źng phŲ░ŲĪng ph├Īp scan cho \textbf{thiß║┐t kß║┐ cß║źp RT-level} v├Ā chß╗®ng minh t├Łnh khß║Ż thi cß╗¦a c├Īc kß╗╣ thuß║Łt n├Āy, mß╗źc cuß╗æi c├╣ng ─æ├Ż sß╗Ł dß╗źng mß╗Öt thiß║┐t kß║┐ RT-level nhß╗Å gß╗Źn kß║┐t hß╗Żp vß╗øi \textbf{Verilog testbench} ─æß╗ā kiß╗ām thß╗Ł scan ─æ├Ż ch├©n. C├Īc thiß║┐t kß║┐ lß╗øn hŲĪn c├│ thß╗ā ─æŲ░ß╗Żc \textbf{ph├ón chia (partition)} th├Ānh nhiß╗üu phß║¦n con (subcomponents), trong ─æ├│ mß╗Śi phß║¦n con c├│ thß╗ā y├¬u cß║¦u mß╗Öt \textbf{dß║Īng scan kh├Īc nhau}. Viß╗ćc t├Īch biß╗ćt thiß║┐t kß║┐ th├Ānh c├Īc phß║¦n con c├│ thß╗ā ─æŲ░ß╗Żc thß╗▒c hiß╗ćn bß║▒ng \textbf{thanh ghi dß╗ŗch (shift register)} ─æß╗ā scan-in v├Ā scan-out c├Īc gi├Ī trß╗ŗ t├Łn hiß╗ću tß║Īi giao diß╗ćn (interface) giß╗»a c├Īc phß║¦n con.
+
+% ======================================================================
+% T├ĆI LIß╗åU THAM KHß║óO
+% ======================================================================

+        <h2 style="color: var(--primary-color);">1. Kh├Īi qu├Īt vß╗ü Scan Design & MUX-DFF</h2>
+        <p><b>─Éß╗Öng lß╗▒c:</b> Mß║Īch tuß║¦n tß╗▒ (Sequential) rß║źt kh├│ kiß╗ām thß╗Ł v├¼ kß║┐t quß║Ż bß╗ŗ kho├Ī trong c├Īc Flip-flops (State
+            lŲ░u lß║Īi).</p>
+        <ul>
+            <li><b>Giß║Żi ph├Īp:</b> Ho├Īn cß║Żi mß║Īch bß║▒ng c├Īch thay thß║┐ DFF thŲ░ß╗Øng th├Ānh <b>Scan Flip-Flop (MUX-DFF)</b>.
+            </li>
+            <li>Khi mß║Īch ß╗¤ <b style="color:red">Normal Mode (SE=0)</b>: Nhß║Łn dß╗» liß╗ću Data In nhŲ░ hoß║Īt ─æß╗Öng hß╗ć thß╗æng.
+            </li>
+            <li>Khi mß║Īch ß╗¤ <b style="color:green">Test Mode (SE=1)</b>: To├Ān bß╗Ö Flip-flop nß╗æi th├Ānh <b>Thanh ghi dß╗ŗch
+                    (Shift Register)</b> d├Āi ─æß╗ā bŲĪm Test Vector v├Āo (Scan In) v├Ā ─æß║®y output lŲ░u trß╗» ra (Scan Out).</li>
